exercises.title: から - Direct Reasons
exercises.intro: Use から after a sentence to give a clear reason. It is direct and common in everyday speech, so it works well for simple explanations and casual answers.
rows: あめが ふっていますから
exercises.takeaway: Put から after the reason: reason + から. For nouns/na-adjectives, use だ + から.

exercises.prompt: Which ending gives a direct everyday reason, like 'because I am busy'?
options: いそがしいから
いそがしいまで
いそがしいのに
いそがしいだけ

exercises.prompt: Say 'I will rest because I am busy' using から:
exercises.translation: I will rest because I am busy.
exercises.speakText: いそがしいから、やすみます。

exercises.title: Connecting Reason to Result
exercises.intro: A reason can come before the result, or you can put the result first and add the reason after. At N5, keep the reason sentence simple and make the connection clear.
rows: あめが ふっていますから、いきません。
ame ga futte imasu kara, ikimasen
Because it is raining, I won't go.
いきません。あめが ふっていますから。
ikimasen. ame ga futte imasu kara
I won't go. Because it is raining.
テストが ありますから、べんきょうします。
tesuto ga arimasu kara, benkyou shimasu
Because there is a test, I will study.
つかれましたから、ねます。
Because I am tired, I will sleep.
やすいですから、かいます。
Because it is cheap, I will buy it.
exercises.takeaway: Reason + から can explain the result before or after it.

exercises.prompt: Which sentence means 'Because there is a test, I will study'?
options: テストが ありますから、べんきょうします。
テストが ありますが、べんきょうします。
テストが ありますね、べんきょうしました。
テストを ありますから、べんきょうします。

exercises.prompt: Say 'Because there is a test, I will study' using から:
patternJp: テストが あります

slot.hint: The marker that attaches to the reason before the result.

exercises.translation: Because there is a test, I will study.
exercises.speakText: テストが ありますから、べんきょうします。

exercises.title: だから - Reasons with Nouns and na-Adjectives
exercises.intro: When the reason is a noun or na-adjective, add だ before から. This keeps the reason sentence complete before you connect it to the result.
rows: because of the rain / because it is rainy
exercises.takeaway: Nouns and na-adjectives need だ before から: noun/na-adj + だから.

exercises.prompt: Which reason correctly uses だから with a noun?
options: あめだから
あめから
あめがから
あめをから

exercises.prompt: Say “Because I am sick, I will rest” using だから:

slot.hint: The noun/na-adjective reason connector: copula + because.

exercises.translation: Because I am sick, I will rest.
exercises.speakText: びょうきだから、やすみます。

exercises.title: ので - Softer Reasons
exercises.intro: Use ので after a reason when you want the explanation to sound softer or more polite. It is common for excuses, notices, and careful explanations.
rows: あめが ふっているので
じかんが ないので
exercises.takeaway: ので gives a reason more softly; nouns and na-adjectives use な before ので.

exercises.prompt: Which is the softer reason form for 'because I am sick'?
options: びょうきなので
びょうきので
びょうきからので
びょうきを ので

exercises.prompt: Say 'Because I am sick, I will rest' using the softer ので:
exercises.translation: Because I am sick, I will rest.
exercises.speakText: びょうきなので、やすみます。

exercises.prompt: Which gives a direct reason naturally?
exercises.title: から for direct because

variants.label: CORRECT
variants.jp: いそがしいから、いきません。
variants.en: Because I am busy, I won't go.
variants.note: から attaches after the reason and directly explains the result.

variants.label: COMMON MISTAKE
variants.jp: いそがしいに、いきません。
variants.en: (intended: because I am busy, I won't go)
variants.note: に does not mark a reason this way.

variants.label: WRONG
variants.jp: いそがしいを、いきません。

exercises.takeaway: Use reason + から for a direct everyday reason.
exercises.speakText: いそがしいから、いきません。

exercises.prompt: Which correctly uses ので after a noun reason?
exercises.title: Nouns and na-adjectives need な before ので

variants.label: CORRECT
variants.jp: びょうきなので、やすみます。
variants.en: Because I am sick, I will rest.
variants.note: A noun-like reason uses な before ので.

variants.label: COMMON MISTAKE
variants.jp: びょうきので、やすみます。
variants.en: (intended: because I am sick, I will rest)
variants.note: Add な before ので after nouns and na-adjectives.

variants.label: DIFFERENT MEANING
variants.jp: びょうきだから、やすみます。
variants.en: Because I am sick, I will rest.
variants.note: This is grammatical, but it uses the more direct から pattern.

exercises.takeaway: For noun or na-adjective reasons, use な + ので.
exercises.speakText: びょうきなので、やすみます。

exercises.prompt: Which sounds like a softer explanation or excuse?
exercises.title: ので is softer than から

variants.label: POLITE
variants.jp: じかんが ないので、しつれいします。
variants.romaji: jikan ga nai node, shitsurei shimasu.
variants.en: Because I don't have time, I will excuse myself.
variants.note: ので makes the explanation sound softer and more careful.

variants.label: NATURAL
variants.jp: じかんが ないから、しつれいします。
variants.romaji: jikan ga nai kara, shitsurei shimasu.
variants.en: Because I don't have time, I will excuse myself.
variants.note: Grammatical, but more direct than the prompt asks for.

variants.label: WRONG
variants.jp: じかんが ないを、しつれいします。
variants.romaji: jikan ga nai o, shitsurei shimasu.
variants.note: を cannot connect a reason to a result.

exercises.takeaway: Use ので for softer reasons, especially when giving an excuse politely.
exercises.speakText: じかんが ないので、しつれいします。

exercises.prompt: Which sentence correctly gives a noun reason with だから?
exercises.title: だから for noun reasons

variants.label: CORRECT
variants.jp: あめだから、タクシーで いきます。
variants.romaji: ame da kara, takushii de ikimasu.
variants.en: Because of the rain, I will go by taxi.
variants.note: あめ is a noun, so use だから before the result.

variants.label: COMMON MISTAKE
variants.jp: あめから、タクシーで いきます。
variants.note: A noun reason needs だ before から.

variants.label: WRONG
variants.jp: あめを、タクシーで いきます。
variants.note: を cannot connect a reason to a result.

exercises.takeaway: For noun reasons, use noun + だから before the result.
exercises.speakText: あめだから、タクシーで いきます。

exercises.title: Reasons in Context
exercises.intro: These examples show direct から reasons, noun/na-adjective だから reasons, and softer ので reasons in everyday beginner situations.
rows: いそがしいから、いきません。
Because I am busy, I won't go.
テストが ありますから、べんきょうします。
tesuto ga arimasu kara, benkyou shimasu.
Because there is a test, I will study.
あめが ふっていますから、かさを もっていきます。
ame ga futte imasu kara, kasa o motte ikimasu.
Because it is raining, I will take an umbrella.
つかれましたから、ねます。
Because I am tired, I will sleep.
びょうきなので、やすみます。
Because I am sick, I will rest.
じかんが ないので、しつれいします。
jikan ga nai node, shitsurei shimasu.
Because I don't have time, I will excuse myself.
あめだから、タクシーで いきます。
ame da kara, takushii de ikimasu.
Because of the rain, I will go by taxi.
やすいですから、かいます。
Because it is cheap, I will buy it.
exercises.takeaway: Choose から for direct reasons, だから for noun/na-adjective reasons, and ので for softer reasons.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: いそがしいから、いきません。
options: Because I am busy, I won't go.
Because I am free, I will go.
I am busy after I go.
I went because I was busy.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: テストが ありますから、べんきょうします。
options: I studied, so there is a test.
Because there is a test, I will study.
There is no test today.
I don't study for tests.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: あめが ふっていますから、かさを もっていきます。
options: Because it is raining, I will take an umbrella.
Because it is sunny, I will leave my umbrella.
I bought an umbrella because it was cheap.
The umbrella is raining.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: つかれましたから、ねます。
options: Because I am tired, I will sleep.
I slept, so I am not tired.
Please sleep because you are tired.
I am tired because I slept.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: びょうきなので、やすみます。
options: Because I am healthy, I will work.
Because I am sick, I will rest.
I rested, so I became sick.
Please visit the hospital.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: じかんが ないので、しつれいします。
options: Because I don't have time, I will excuse myself.
I have a lot of free time.
What time is it?
Please wait for a long time.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: あめだから、タクシーで いきます。
options: Because of the rain, I will go by taxi.
I will walk because it is sunny.
The taxi is raining.
I will buy an umbrella tomorrow.

exercises.prompt: Listen and choose the correct English meaning:
exercises.speakText: やすいですから、かいます。
options: Because it is cheap, I will buy it.
Because it is expensive, I won't buy it.
I bought it yesterday.
Please make it cheaper.

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: いそがしいから、いきません

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: テストが ありますから、べんきょうします
exercises.answer: tesuto ga arimasu kara benkyou shimasu
acceptAlternatives: tesuto ga arimasu kara, benkyou shimasu
tesuto ga arimasu kara benkyo shimasu

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: あめが ふっていますから、かさを もっていきます
exercises.answer: ame ga futte imasu kara kasa o motte ikimasu
acceptAlternatives: ame ga futte imasu kara, kasa wo motte ikimasu

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: つかれましたから、ねます

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: びょうきなので、やすみます

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: じかんが ないので、しつれいします
exercises.answer: jikan ga nai node shitsurei shimasu
acceptAlternatives: jikan ga nai node, shitsurei shimasu

exercises.prompt: Listen and type what you hear in romaji:
exercises.speakText: あめだから、タクシーで いきます
exercises.answer: ame da kara takushii de ikimasu

exercises.prompt: Match each word to its meaning:

cards.jp: いそがしいから、いきません。
cards.en: Because I am busy, I won't go.

cards.jp: テストが ありますから、べんきょうします。
cards.romaji: tesuto ga arimasu kara, benkyou shimasu.
cards.en: Because there is a test, I will study.

cards.jp: あめが ふっていますから、かさを もっていきます。
cards.romaji: ame ga futte imasu kara, kasa o motte ikimasu.
cards.en: Because it is raining, I will take an umbrella.

cards.jp: つかれましたから、ねます。
cards.en: Because I am tired, I will sleep.

cards.jp: びょうきなので、やすみます。
cards.en: Because I am sick, I will rest.

cards.jp: じかんが ないので、しつれいします。
cards.romaji: jikan ga nai node, shitsurei shimasu.
cards.en: Because I don't have time, I will excuse myself.

cards.jp: あめだから、タクシーで いきます。
cards.romaji: ame da kara, takushii de ikimasu.
cards.en: Because of the rain, I will go by taxi.

cards.jp: やすいですから、かいます。
cards.en: Because it is cheap, I will buy it.

cards.jp: すきだから、まいにち たべます。
cards.en: Because I like it, I eat it every day.

cards.jp: あめが ふっているので、タクシーで いきます。
cards.romaji: ame ga futte iru node, takushii de ikimasu.
cards.en: Because it is raining, I will go by taxi.
